headline: Zip Launches AI Agents for Accounting, Helping the World’s Most Complex Companies Close the Books Faster and More Accurately
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 06, 2026--Zip, the leading AI platform for enterprise procurement, today launched AI Automation for Procure-to-Pay
